question_text: A book is resting on a table. Which of the following best describes the forces acting on the book?

options.label: A
options.text: The weight force is much larger than the normal force from the table

options.label: B
options.text: The weight force downwards equals the normal force upwards, so the forces are balanced

options.label: C
options.text: There is only one force acting on the book: gravity

options.label: D
options.text: The forces are unbalanced, which is why the book stays at rest

explanation: When an object is at rest, the forces acting on it must be balanced. The downward pull of gravity (weight) is balanced by the upward push from the table (normal force), so the book doesn't accelerate.
